title: The Warehousing Corporations Act, 1962
full_text: The Warehousing Corporations Act, 1962 भाण्‍डागारण निगम अधिनियम,1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196258 Act Number: 58 Enactment Date: 1962-12-19 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The Warehousing Corporations Act, 1962 Hindi Title: भाण्‍डागारण निगम अधिनियम,1962 Long Title: An Act to provide for the incorporation and regulation of corporations for the purpose of warehousing of agricultural produce and certain other commodities and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution Department: Department of Food and Public Distribution Enforcement Date: 18-03-1963 Notification: 18th March, 1963, vide notification No. G.S.R. 463, dated 16th March, 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Pt. II, sec. 3 (i). This Act shall, in its application to the States specified in the Schedule to Act 20 of 1965, have effect as if in clause (e) of section 2 the words and figures "being a commodity with respect to which Parliament has power to make laws by virtue of entry 33 in List III in the Seventh Schedule to the Constitution" had been omitted: vide Act 20 of 1965, s. 2 (w.e.f. 27-11-1965). Schedule 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 2A. Construction of references to any law not in force or any functionary not in existence in any State. Section 3. The Central Warehousing Corporation. Section 4. Share capital and shareholders. Section 5. Shares to be guaranteed by Central Government and to be trust or approved securities. Section 6. Management of Central Warehousing Corporation. Section 7. Directors. Section 8. Disqualification for office of director of the Central Warehousing Corporation. Section 9. Removal of directors from office. Section 10. Appointment of officers, etc., and their conditions of service. Section 11. Functions of Central Warehousing Corporation. Section 12. Executive Committee. Section 13. Meetings of the Corporation. Section 14. Grants and loans by the Central Government. Section 15. Corporation to maintain two funds. Section 16. Warehousing Fund. Section 17. General Fund. Section 18. State Warehousing Corporations. Section 19. Share capital and shareholders. Section 20. Management of a State Warehousing Corporation. Section 21. Disqualification for office of director of the Corporation. Section 22. Removal of directors from office. Section 23. Appointment of officers, etc., and their conditions of service. Section 24. Functions of the State Warehousing Corporation. Section 25. Executive Committee. Section 26. Submission of programme of activities and financial estimates. Section 27. Borrowing powers of Warehousing Corporation. Section 28. Deposit account. Section 29. Investment of funds. Section 30. Disposal of profits. Section 31. Accounts and audit of Warehousing Corporation. Section 31A. Returns and reports. Section 32. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate acts and proceedings of Warehousing Corporations. Section 33. Delegation. Section 34. Voting rights of shareholders. Section 35. Disputes between Central Warehousing Corporation and State Warehousing Corporation. Section 36. Declaration of fidelity and secrecy. Section 37. Indemnity of directors. Section 38. Omitted. Section 39. Provisions relating to income-tax and super-tax. Section 40. Winding up of Warehousing Corporations. Section 41. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 42. Power of Warehousing Corporations to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 43. Repeal and savings. Schedule 1.
